title: BASIC NEEDS - 211info
text: FISH OF ALBANY INC BASIC NEEDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides food boxes, clothing, shoes, bedding, personal and feminine hygiene products, diapers, baby food and formula, assistance in acquiring identification documents, gasoline and propane vouchers, and local bus tickets. Availability is subject to donations and eligibility. 1035 SE 2nd Avenue Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Food and clothing: By appointment only All other services: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 928-4460 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 928-4460 Main phone Main phone (541) 928-4460 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to make an appointment. Visit website for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of name and address for all household members AREA SERVED: Linn County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the intersection of SE Main Street and SE 2nd Avenue, next to the 7-11 Services: Bedding/Linen Bus Fare Diapers Food Pantries Formula/Baby Food Gas Money General Clothing Provision Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Personal/Grooming Supplies Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance Shoes Other Services Offered At This Location: UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FISH OF ALBANY INC
